title: Application-scoped TPA Claims policy search contract
open_issues: Configurator Hub lint remains blocked by known unrelated ESLint/esquery tooling crash in config.ts.
closed_issues: Workitem created separately from prior lifecycle hotfix work.
Legacy /v3/tpa-claims/policies removed — product not in production, FE update planned in sequence.
Implementation complete: 23 tests passing, loader regression clean.
Merge/deploy checkpoint completed against local feature branch content.
Policyholder name/email/phone filters are now namespace-scoped and no longer cross-match other properties.
Backend redeploy candidate updated to c97e197 after removing jsonb_typeof from text property filters.
Application policy search now supports single-field order_by with default -created.
Application policy search now returns service and distributor objects as additive response fields.
Application policy search now supports limit/offset pagination without total count.
Human smoke tests completed satisfactorily for the policy search flow.
Backend redeploy/smoke retest gap closed by human acceptance.
Remote merge/deploy confirmation gap closed by human smoke evidence.

human_overrides.decision: Do not treat this as a hotfix; create a specific workitem for the policy search endpoint contract correction.
Use existing branch feature/tpaclaims-operator-policy-claim-opening for both changed repositories instead of creating a new branch, to allow ongoing smoke tests during implementation.

last_transition_summary: human smoke tests satisfactory; application policy search contract completed
